title: OneCLI - Open-Source Credential Gateway for AI Agents
excerpt: Agents talk to OneCLI. OneCLI talks to the service. Keys never leave the vault. Open-source gateway + encrypted vault + dashboard in one Docker container.
content_html:
Backed byY Combinator

The credential gateway
for AI agents

Route every request through OneCLI.
Enforce policies, inject credentials. Keys never leave the vault.

.envproxied by onecli

OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-proj-Xh4mQ2████████f8Kwonecli-managed ✓

STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=sk_live_51Hx8m████████Rq2vonecli-managed ✓

GITHUB_TOKEN=ghp_uV4nR7Tk████████p3Xzonecli-managed ✓

AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=aK9dPmXw████████L7Rqonecli-managed ✓

DATABASE_URL=postgres://acme:pg4s█████@db.acme.ioonecli-managed ✓

SLACK_BOT_TOKEN=xoxb-8214-Ju7wK████████m2Nponecli-managed ✓

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-api03-R5kT████████v8Nqonecli-managed ✓

7keys exposed to agents

Want this for your environment?

Trusted by

Every agent. One gateway.

Scoped credentials injected per request. Agents never hold a real secret.

OneCLI secures them all

OneCLI enforces at the network layer, covering every path your agent takes:
MCP tool calls, CLI commands, curl, and the code it writes.

“CLIs are super exciting precisely because they are a ‘legacy’ technology, which means AI agents can natively and easily use them.”

Andrej KarpathyAI researcher · 1.9M views on X

Rules agents can't break

Prompts are suggestions. OneCLI policies are enforced at the network layer, outside the agent, outside the LLM. No matter what the model decides, the proxy enforces your rules deterministically.

Block endpoints

Prevent agents from calling specific APIs (DELETE /repos, POST /payments, or any path you define). Enforced at the proxy, not a suggestion.

Rate limit per agent

Cap how many requests an agent can make per minute, hour, or day. Stop runaway loops before they cause damage.

Require approval

Flag sensitive operations for human review before they go through. Agents wait, you decide.

Scope per project

Each agent only accesses the credentials and services assigned to its project. No cross-project leakage.

See how it works

Get started

Start securing your agents today

Free forever for up to 2 agents. No credit card required.

content_html_zh:
由 Y Combinator 支持

AI 代理的凭证网关

通过 OneCLI 路由每个请求。执行策略、注入凭据。 钥匙永远不会离开金库。

.envproxied 由 onecli

OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-proj-Xh4mQ2uccinodswmsw0f8Kwonecli 管理 ✓

STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=sk_live_51Hx8m████████Rq2vonecli 管理 ✓

GITHUB_TOKEN=ghp_uV4nR7Tk████████p3Xzonecli 管理 ✓

AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=aK9dPmXw████████L7Rqonecli 管理 ✓

DATABASE_URL=postgres://acme:pg4s█████@db.acme.ioonecli-管理 ✓

7把钥匙暴露给特工

想要这个适合您的环境吗？

值得信赖

每个代理。 一个网关。

每个请求注入的范围凭据。 特工从来不保守真正的秘密。

OneCLI 确保所有这些的安全

OneCLI 在网络层强制执行，涵盖代理采用的每条路径：MCP 工具调用、CLI 命令、curl 及其编写的代码。

“CLI 非常令人兴奋，因为它们是一项‘传统’技术，这意味着人工智能代理可以轻松地在本地使用它们。”

Andrej KarpathyAI researcher · 1.9M views on X

特工不能违反规则

提示是建议。 OneCLI 策略在网络层、代理外部、LLM 外部实施。 无论模型决定什么，代理都会确定性地执行您的规则。

阻止端点

防止代理调用特定 API（DELETE /repos、POST / payment 或您定义的任何路径）。 在代理处强制执行，而不是建议。

每个代理的速率限制

限制代理每分钟、每小时或每天可以发出的请求数量。 在失控循环造成损坏之前将其停止。

需要批准

在敏感操作完成之前标记其以供人工审核。 特工等待，你决定。

每个项目的范围

每个代理只能访问分配给其项目的凭证和服务。 无跨项目泄漏。

See how it works

开始使用

从今天开始保护您的代理

最多 2 名代理永久免费。 无需信用卡。
